excerpt:
<details open>

opencl: improve get_rows, cpy, concat and q6_k flat gemv (#24160)

* opencl: allow multiple workgroups for large rows

* opencl: improve small cpy

* opencl: packed concat for small input

* opencl: tweak flat q6_K gemv, increase N_DST and remap threads

</details>

**macOS/iOS:**
- [macOS Apple Silicon (arm64)](https://github.com/ggml-org/llama.cpp/releases/download/b9536/llama-b9536-bin-macos-arm64.tar.gz)
- macOS Apple Silicon (arm64, KleidiAI enabled) [DISABLED](https://github.com/ggml-org/llama.cpp/pull/23780)
- [macOS Intel (x64)](https://github.com/ggml-org/llama.cpp/releases/download/b9536/llama-b9536-bin-macos-x64.tar.gz)
- [iOS XCFramework](https://github.com/ggml-org/llama.cpp/releases/download/b9536/llama-b9536-xcframework.zip)

**Linux:**
- [Ubuntu x64 (CPU)](https://github.com/ggml-org/llama.cpp/releases/download/b9536/llama-b9536-bin-ubuntu-x64.tar.gz)
- [Ubuntu arm64 (CPU)](https://github.com/ggml-org/llama.cpp/releases/download/b9536/llama-b9536-bin-ubuntu-arm64.tar.gz)
- [Ubuntu s390x (CPU)](https://github.com/ggml-org/llama.cpp/releases/download/b9536/llama-b9536-bin-ubuntu-s390x.tar.gz)
- [Ubuntu x64 (Vulkan)](https://github.com/ggml-org/llama.cp
